prompt: An anime-style overhead shot of a [flat lay subject] — [product type] among [lifestyle objects] arranged on a [surface], [lens] overhead locked, [light quality] diffused from directly above, the composition deliberately arranged but rendered in [art style] aesthetic with slightly heightened saturation and clean outlines, a [character hand or element] at the frame edge implying presence, cinematic anime flat lay still, 1:1 or 16:9. Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
